articles.title: Belgium ends the USA’s World Cup dream with a dominant 4-1 win in the Round of 16 - CNN
articles.description: The summer of soccer love is over for the USA’s World Cup squad after losing 4-1 to Belgium.

articles.title: Carli Lloyd critical of USMNT, Christian Pulisic following World Cup exit - Awful Announcing
articles.description: Fox Sports analyst Carli Lloyd didn't pull any punches following the match, saying that it felt like the American side lost before it even began.

articles.title: ‘MAGA agenda on display’: FIFA, Trump slammed amid Balogun red card row - Al Jazeera
articles.description: Football experts, officials warn of ‘dangerous precedent’ set by FIFA after U-turn on red card for USA forward Balogun.

articles.title: Celtics' Stevens cites 'challenging' path to explain Brown trade - ESPN
articles.description: Brad Stevens said Monday that the Celtics traded Jaylen Brown to keep the team competitive and add more optionality with draft assets.

articles.title: Terrion Arnold’s hearing regarding monitoring device was postponed until Friday - NBC Sports
articles.description: A hearing on whether free-agent cornerback Terrion Arnold will be required to wear an ankle monitor while on home confinement pending trial of eight felony charges had been scheduled for Monday.

articles.title: Why Paramount is keeping Conor McGregor’s UFC return off CBS - Awful Announcing
articles.description: Conor McGregor returns to UFC in UFC 329, but the event will be totally exclusive to Paramount+. That might suggest a strategy change.

articles.title: Newly named Clemson president opts to stay at Michigan State - WSPA 7NEWS
articles.description: The man previously announced to be the new president of Clemson University has elected not to come to the university.

articles.title: Socialist mayor Katie Wilson silent amid protests over ‘human dumping ground’ ahead of US World Cup match - Fox News
articles.description: CID businesses report a major decline in foot traffic during the FIFA World Cup as residents protest Mayor Katie Wilson over crime and drug dealing.

articles.title: Keir Starmer helped stop earlier England vs. Mexico kickoff - Politico
articles.description: The outgoing prime minister gave English players a few extra hours to acclimatize to the Mexico City altitute.

articles.title: Spain vs. Portugal Prediction, Odds, Picks For World Cup Match - FOX Sports
articles.description: Check out the odds for the Spain vs. Portugal Round of 16 matchup at the 2026 FIFA World Cup.
